Use the message tool if you need to notify the user directly with an explicit target. If you do not send directly, your final plain-text reply will be delivered automatically.
I'll run a sync to GitHub to save version history. Let me check the current state of the workspace repos first.

content.text: Good — there are multiple repos to sync. The main OpenClaw config repo has changes, and there are several workspace repos plus other project repos. Let me sync them all.

arguments.command:
# Sync the main OpenClaw config repo
cd /Users/landonking/.openclaw && git add -A && git commit -m "version save: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%MZ)" && git push 2>&1 | tail -20

# Sync the main workspace
cd /Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace && git add -A && git commit -m "version save: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%MZ)" && git push 2>&1 | tail -20
